/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/openpix_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/CaptureManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/OverlayWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/Toolbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/AnnotationManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/OcrEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/Stitcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/ScrollCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/src/LongImageWidget.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/wlr-screencopy-unstable-v1-protocol.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/AngleNet.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/clipper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/CrnnNet.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/DbNet.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/OcrLite.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/OcrLiteImpl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/OcrResultUtils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openpix.dir/_deps/rapidocr-src/src/OcrUtils.cpp.o" -o openpix  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 -lwayland-client -lm -lonnxruntime /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
